logger.doc:name: Log Request Start
logger.message: Request Started: Method: #[vars.requestMethod], URI: #[vars.requestUri], Client IP: #[vars.clientIP], User-Agent: #[vars.userAgent], Content-Type: #[vars.contentType], Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Request End
logger.message: Request Completed: Method: #[vars.requestMethod], URI: #[vars.requestUri], Status: #[vars.responseStatus], Response Time: #[vars.responseTime]ms, Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Performance Metrics
logger.message: PERF_METRIC | Method: #[vars.requestMethod] | URI: #[vars.requestUri] | ResponseTime: #[vars.responseTime]ms | Status: #[vars.responseStatus] | ClientIP: #[vars.clientIP] | CorrelationId: #[correlationId] | Timestamp: #[vars.requestEndTime as String {format: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'}]

logger.doc:name: Log Slow Request Alert
logger.message: SLOW REQUEST ALERT: Request took #[vars.responseTime]ms to complete. Method: #[vars.requestMethod], URI: #[vars.requestUri], Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Audit Event
logger.message: AUDIT_EVENT | Action: #[vars.auditAction] | UserId: #[vars.userId] | ClientIP: #[vars.clientIP default attributes.remoteAddress default 'UNKNOWN'] | SessionId: #[vars.sessionId] | CorrelationId: #[correlationId] | Timestamp: #[vars.auditTimestamp as String {format: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'}] | Details: #[vars.auditDetails default 'No additional details']

logger.doc:name: Log DB Operation Start
logger.message: Database Operation Started: Operation: #[vars.dbOperation default 'UNKNOWN'], Table: #[vars.dbTable default 'UNKNOWN'], Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log DB Operation End
logger.message: Database Operation Completed: Operation: #[vars.dbOperation], Table: #[vars.dbTable], Duration: #[vars.dbOperationTime]ms, Records Affected: #[vars.recordsAffected default 'N/A'], Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Slow DB Operation
logger.message: SLOW_DB_OPERATION | Operation: #[vars.dbOperation] | Table: #[vars.dbTable] | Duration: #[vars.dbOperationTime]ms | CorrelationId: #[correlationId] | Timestamp: #[vars.dbEndTime as String {format: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'}]

logger.doc:name: Log HTTP Client Request
logger.message: HTTP Client Request: Method: #[vars.httpMethod], URL: #[vars.targetUrl], Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log HTTP Client Response
logger.message: HTTP Client Response: Method: #[vars.httpMethod], URL: #[vars.targetUrl], Status: #[vars.responseStatus], Response Time: #[vars.httpClientResponseTime]ms, Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log External API Performance
logger.message: EXTERNAL_API_CALL | Method: #[vars.httpMethod] | URL: #[vars.targetUrl] | ResponseTime: #[vars.httpClientResponseTime]ms | Status: #[vars.responseStatus] | CorrelationId: #[correlationId] | Timestamp: #[vars.httpClientEndTime as String {format: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'}]

logger.doc:name: Log Business Event
logger.message: Business Event: Event: #[vars.businessEvent default 'UNKNOWN'], Entity: #[vars.entityType default 'UNKNOWN'], EntityId: #[vars.entityId default 'UNKNOWN'], Action: #[vars.businessAction default 'UNKNOWN'], User: #[vars.userId default 'ANONYMOUS'], Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Validation Success
logger.message: Validation Successful: Type: #[vars.validationType default 'UNKNOWN'], Entity: #[vars.entityType default 'UNKNOWN'], Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Validation Failure
logger.message: Validation Failed: Type: #[vars.validationType default 'UNKNOWN'], Entity: #[vars.entityType default 'UNKNOWN'], Errors: #[vars.validationErrors default 'No specific errors'], Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

flow-var.name: auditDetails
flow-var.value: #['Type: ' ++ (vars.validationType default 'UNKNOWN') ++ ', Entity: ' ++ (vars.entityType default 'UNKNOWN') ++ ', Errors: ' ++ (vars.validationErrors default 'No specific errors')]

logger.doc:name: Log Security Event
logger.message: Security Event: Type: #[vars.securityEventType default 'UNKNOWN'], Action: #[vars.securityAction default 'UNKNOWN'], User: #[vars.userId default 'ANONYMOUS'], Client IP: #[vars.clientIP default attributes.remoteAddress default 'UNKNOWN'], Resource: #[vars.resourceAccessed default 'UNKNOWN'], Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Configuration Change
logger.message: Configuration Change: Component: #[vars.configComponent default 'UNKNOWN'], Property: #[vars.configProperty default 'UNKNOWN'], Old Value: #[vars.oldValue default 'N/A'], New Value: #[vars.newValue default 'N/A'], Changed By: #[vars.userId default 'SYSTEM'], Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

flow-var.name: auditDetails
flow-var.value: #['Component: ' ++ (vars.configComponent default 'UNKNOWN') ++ ', Property: ' ++ (vars.configProperty default 'UNKNOWN') ++ ', Old: ' ++ (vars.oldValue default 'N/A') ++ ', New: ' ++ (vars.newValue default 'N/A')]

logger.doc:name: Log Debug Information
logger.message: Debug Info: Component: #[vars.debugComponent default 'UNKNOWN'], Message: #[vars.debugMessage default 'No message'], Data: #[vars.debugData default 'No data'], Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Health Check
logger.message: Health Check: Service: #[vars.serviceName default 'UNKNOWN'], Status: #[vars.healthStatus default 'UNKNOWN'], Response Time: #[vars.healthCheckTime default 'N/A']ms, Details: #[vars.healthDetails default 'No details'], Correlation ID: #[correlationId]

logger.doc:name: Log Health Check Performance
logger.message: HEALTH_CHECK | Service: #[vars.serviceName default 'UNKNOWN'] | Status: #[vars.healthStatus default 'UNKNOWN'] | ResponseTime: #[vars.healthCheckTime default 'N/A']ms | CorrelationId: #[correlationId] | Timestamp: #[now() as String {format: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'}]
